text:
The Hunter Association Exorcist is a female Nen exorcist for the Hunter Association. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 325 

Appearance

The Hunter Association exorcist has long, dark hair and wears an ornate robe and undergarment. She also wears a headband. 

Personality

Although little is known about her personality, she was left aghast by Gon's terrifying condition after his fight against Neferpitou. 

Background

At some point in her life, the Hunter Association exorcist completed the Hunter Exam and learned Nen. She is also the only official Nen exorcist within the Hunter Association. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

At a hospital in Swardani City, the exorcist visits Gon and immediately says that it's impossible for anyone to remove it, adding that it's far beyond her ability. While talking with Knov on the phone about Killua's intention to heal Gon, Morel says that the only official Hunter Association exorcist was unable to help him. 

Succession Contest arc

On the tenth day of the Black Whale's voyage, Prince Camilla's guard Sarahell worries about the Princes' Nen beasts, also considering the Hunter Association and the possibility of them having an exorcist aboard the ship. She summons the Majordomo, Fukataki and she asks her if the Tenth, Eleventh, or Thirteenth Prince is the best to target, hoping for the Prince to live a few days while they see if the Hunters have an exorcist with them. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 389 

Abilities & Powers

The Hunter Association exorcist has all the benefits granted by her status as a Hunter. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, she is capable of using Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 being skilled enough to develop her own Nen ability as an exorcist. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Miscellaneous

The Hunter Association exorcist shares the same Japanese voice actress as Haruna in the 2011 anime adaptation.
